summary: Privacy-safe synthetic data for regulated AI training.
editor_note: The bet is that regulated AI teams need usable fake data, not another masking rulebook. Secludy shows differential-privacy presets, text and table anonymization examples, canary PII leakage tests, self-hosted VPC/on-prem deployment, and a claimed under-1-hour setup. Unlike legacy masking, it tries to preserve model utility while moving sensitive records out of scope. The risk is that privacy budgets become another specialist bottleneck.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Secludy: Privacy-safe synthetic data for regulated AI training.
